markdown.markdown:
`search.mcts`

AlphaZero-style MCTS with chance-node handling for backgammon.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Analysis](#raccoon.search.mcts.Analysis) | Full MCTS analysis of a position, for display/debugging. |
| [Candidate](#raccoon.search.mcts.Candidate) | A single candidate move from MCTS analysis. |
| [MCTS](#raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS) | Monte Carlo Tree Search with PUCT selection. |
| [MCTSNode](#raccoon.search.mcts.MCTSNode) | A node in the MCTS tree. Only decision and terminal nodes are stored. |

### Analysis { #raccoon.search.mcts.Analysis }

```python
search.mcts.Analysis(candidates, root_value, num_simulations)
```

Full MCTS analysis of a position, for display/debugging.

### Candidate { #raccoon.search.mcts.Candidate }

```python
search.mcts.Candidate(action, visits, visit_prob, prior, q_value)
```

A single candidate move from MCTS analysis.

### MCTS { #raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS }

```python
search.mcts.MCTS(
    network,
    num_simulations=100,
    c_puct=1.5,
    virtual_loss_count=1,
    dirichlet_alpha=0.0,
    noise_eps=0.25,
)
```

Monte Carlo Tree Search with PUCT selection.

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [analyze](#raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS.analyze) | Run MCTS and return a full Analysis with per-candidate stats. |
| [search](#raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS.search) | Run MCTS and return (action -> visit proportion, visit entropy). |
| [search_with_value](#raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS.search_with_value) | Run MCTS and return (action_probs, visit_entropy, root_q_value). |

##### analyze { #raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS.analyze }

```python
search.mcts.MCTS.analyze(state)
```

Run MCTS and return a full Analysis with per-candidate stats.

##### search { #raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS.search }

```python
search.mcts.MCTS.search(state)
```

Run MCTS and return (action -> visit proportion, visit entropy).

##### search_with_value { #raccoon.search.mcts.MCTS.search_with_value }

```python
search.mcts.MCTS.search_with_value(state)
```

Run MCTS and return (action_probs, visit_entropy, root_q_value).

### MCTSNode { #raccoon.search.mcts.MCTSNode }

```python
search.mcts.MCTSNode(state, parent=None, parent_action=None, prior=0.0)
```

A node in the MCTS tree. Only decision and terminal nodes are stored.

Uses lazy child creation: when a node is expanded (evaluated by the
network), only the prior probabilities are stored. Child nodes are
created on-demand when first selected by PUCT, avoiding expensive
state cloning for actions that are never visited.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [select_action](#raccoon.search.mcts.select_action) | Sample an action from the visit distribution. |

### select_action { #raccoon.search.mcts.select_action }

```python
search.mcts.select_action(action_probs, temperature=1.0)
```

Sample an action from the visit distribution.
